ResearchProjectDef.label: housekeeping
ResearchProjectDef.description: The humble art of keeping a dwelling fit to live in. Bundles of straw bound to sticks, dustpans hewn from bark, and the realisation that grit on the floor eventually finds the inside of a wound.

ResearchProjectDef.label: sanitation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Modern practices and gear for keeping a settlement clean. Boots that grip wet floors, gloves that handle solvents, and coveralls with pockets deep enough to lose a wrench in.

ResearchProjectDef.label: atomic sanitation
ResearchProjectDef.description: Glitterworld field theory applied to the unglamorous problem of grime. A handheld emitter severs the local binding between matter and the spacetime it presently occupies; the matter, deprived of a reason to stay, simply doesn't. Janitors call it 'the vacuum' because nobody pays them to use longer words.
